name: DENDAM : Justice and Law for The Murderer
short_description: DENDAM: Justice and Law for the Murderer Feel the tension in the latest horror action game "Hide and Seek", where you must survive by hiding from a terrifying entity that relentlessly hunts you. In this game, nowhere is truly safe listen carefully, hold your breath, and don’t get caught.
detailed_description:
DENDAM: Justice and Law for the Murderer

Feel the tension in the latest horror action game "Hide and Seek", where you must survive by hiding from a terrifying entity that relentlessly hunts you. In this game, nowhere is truly safe listen carefully, hold your breath, and don’t get caught.

Key Features:

- Intense hide and seek gameplay that blends strategy and silence

- Eerie environments with dark, atmospheric graphics

- A mysterious story that unfolds as you explore

- Spine-chilling sound effects that will keep your heart racing

Can you survive? Or will you become the next victim?

Play now and test your courage in the scariest game of hide and seek you've ever experienced!

Play 3 Games in 1 App:

- ACT 1: Home

- ACT 2: Haunted (featuring the Patient Ghost & Tuyul)

- ACT 3: Murderer

DENDAM: Justice and Law for the Murderer is a horror action game where a nurse in Clinic Z becomes the subject of cruel experiments and is eventually murdered by the clinic's owner. Her husband, unwilling to accept the injustice, seeks revenge. Will he be able to uncover the evidence of the murder?

A chilling murder story!

Play through 3 unique gameplay modes — hide and seek, chase in tight spaces, and complete assigned objectives to uncover the truth.

This is a hide and seek survival game. You can fight back using weapons, but with only one bullet loaded at a time. Along the way, ghosts will haunt and interfere with your progress. Solve various puzzles to complete your tasks and survive the horror.

About the Game:

- Pause & Settings Menu

- Difficulty Modes: Practice, Normal, Hard

- Checkpoint System
